guideline_name: Indian Psychiatric Society Clinical Practice Guidelines (verify exact guideline/edition)
last_reviewed_by: PLACEHOLDER - not yet reviewed; verify against source and sign off

rules.explanation_for_clinician: Choose an antipsychotic by efficacy and side-effect profile and patient preference; second-generation agents require baseline and periodic metabolic monitoring.
missing_investigations: Baseline weight/BMI, fasting glucose/HbA1c, lipids; ECG where indicated.

rules.explanation_for_clinician: Clozapine is reserved for treatment-resistant schizophrenia (after adequate trials of two antipsychotics) and requires mandatory blood-count monitoring; it is not a first-line choice.
monitoring_required: Mandatory ANC / blood-count monitoring per clozapine protocol.

rules.explanation_for_clinician: Where adherence is a concern and a long-acting injectable formulation exists for the chosen agent, an LAI can support relapse prevention.
